scripts.dev:web: concurrently -k -n convex,server,web -c green,yellow,blue "bun run --cwd packages/convex dev" "bun run --cwd apps/server dev" "bun run --cwd apps/web dev"
scripts.dev:mobile: concurrently -k -n convex,mobile -c green,magenta "bun run --cwd packages/convex dev" "bun run --cwd apps/mobile dev-client"
scripts.dev:all: concurrently -k -n convex,server,web,mobile -c green,yellow,blue,magenta "bun run --cwd packages/convex dev" "bun run --cwd apps/server dev" "bun run --cwd apps/web dev" "bun run --cwd apps/mobile dev-client"
scripts.install:all: bun run install:web && bun run install:server && bun run install:mobile && bun run install:shared && bun run install:convex
scripts.lint: bun run --cwd apps/web lint && bun run --cwd apps/server lint && bun run --cwd apps/mobile lint && bun run --cwd packages/shared lint && bun run --cwd packages/convex lint
scripts.test: bun run --cwd apps/web test && bun run --cwd apps/server test && bun run --cwd apps/mobile test && bun run --cwd packages/shared test && bun run --cwd packages/convex test
scripts.test:manual:codex-confidence: bun run env:check && bun run --cwd apps/server test:confidence
scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd apps/web typecheck && bun run --cwd apps/server typecheck && bun run --cwd apps/mobile typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/shared typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/convex typecheck
scripts.health: bun run env:check && bun run --cwd apps/web health && bun run --cwd apps/server health && bun run --cwd apps/mobile health && bun run --cwd packages/shared health && bun run --cwd packages/convex health
scripts.health:web: bun run env:check && bun run --cwd apps/web health
scripts.health:server: bun run env:check && bun run --cwd apps/server health
scripts.health:mobile: bun run env:check && bun run --cwd apps/mobile health
scripts.health:shared: bun run env:check && bun run --cwd packages/shared health
scripts.health:convex: bun run env:check && bun run --cwd packages/convex health
